creator: mx5arbc@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Sepherosa Ziehau from comment #4)

Hosting Windows is W10 PRO 64 with HYPER-V, latest Creators' Update (1703) but previous anniversary version 1607 experienced this as well.

I've been testing this now for about 6 months and various versions of 11.0.X and 11.1.X more recently.   

So, yes I have tried 11.1.X and problem still remains.   IDE defined disks are recognized but not SCSI-defined drives whenever it's run in HYPER-V.   When running on dedicated computer, all is well.    

None of the 10.X series of O/S had this issue with HYPER-V.
